questions.question_html: What should be added to 37.28 to obtain 46.8?
questions.solution_html:
Here, we want to fill in the box in 37.28 + x = 46.8. For this, We will have to find 46.8 - 37.28. We perform this operation as follows by writing the two numbers having an equal number of decimal places: (Since 46.8 = 46.80)

Hence, the required number to be added to 37.28 is 9.52.

questions.question_html: Gorang purchased 2kg 280g apples, 3kg 375g bananas, 225g grapes and 5kg 385g oranges. Find the total weight of the fruits purchased by Gorang in kg.
questions.solution_html:
Weight of apples = 2kg 280g = 2280g (Since 1kg = 1000g)
Weight of bananas = 3kg 375g = 3375g
Weight of grapes = 225g
Weight of oranges = 5kg 385g = 5385g
Total weight = 2280g + 3375g + 225g + 5385g

Thus, total weight = 11265g = {tex}11265 \over 1000{/tex} kg
= 11.265kg i.e. 11kg 265g.

questions.question_html: What should be added to 25.5 to get 50?
questions.solution_html:
According to question, 25.5 + x 
i.e., x = 50 - 25.5
= 24.5
Thus, the required number is 24.5.

questions.question_html:
Energy content of different foods are as follows:

Food Energy Content per kg.
Wheat 3.2 Joules
Rice 5.3 Joules
Potatoes (Cooked) 3.7 Joules
Milk 3.0 Joules

Which food provides the least energy and which provides the maximum?
Express the least energy as a fraction of the maximum energy.
questions.solution_html:
Milk provides the least energy and rice provides the maximum energy
{tex}\therefore{/tex} The required fraction ={tex}\frac{3.0}{5.3}=\frac{3.0 \times 10}{5.3 \times 10} =\frac{30}{53}{/tex}.

questions.question_html: Which one is greater? 1 metre 40 centimetres + 60 centimetres or 2.6 metres.
questions.solution_html:
1 metre 40 centimetres + 60 centimetres = 1.40 metres + 0.60 metres
[100 centimetres = 1 metre]
= 2.00 metres
since, 2.6 > 2.00
{tex}\therefore{/tex} 2.6 metres is greater.
